PVP is about consistency in a sense

wdym by unique abilities

that's the point vs lastman who is saying that limited champions have some overpowered thing that they can do because they're limited.

i mean limited characters doesn't mean they are overpowered because they have "unique" kits
I mean that was last man's point not mine. My point was counter-intuitive to his.
oh yeah i misunderstood, sorry. i thought you were asking
No I was telling him that there's beneficial characters even if they're standard you don't have to have limited characters to be successful imho.
well yeah, i mean my deck consist of 3 standards
Yeah I mean I see doll Lotan etc. frequently in traphase so I was just rebutt'ing the fact that you need  "he limited characters (as in non-standard) " - lastman to succeed

But the thing is, strike-based heroes are easily countered with paralysis effect such as Tulu. The only reason i use it on Ogier because he has self-dispel that can remove paralysis effect
